message:
docs(AGENTS.md): add cass (Cross-Agent Session Search) tool reference

Add documentation section for the cass CLI tool which indexes prior
agent conversations (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, ChatGPT)
for cross-session knowledge reuse. Includes usage examples, tips for
--robot/--json flags, field filtering, agent filtering, and recency
limiting. This helps agents avoid re-solving problems already handled
in previous sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -689,7 +689,7 @@ rg -l -t rust 'unwrap\(' | xargs ast-grep run -l Rust -p '$X.unwrap()' --json
 
 ```
 mcp__morph-mcp__warp_grep(
-  repoPath: "/dp/frankenterm",
+  repoPath: "/data/projects/frankenterm-rch",
   query: "How does the pattern detection engine work?"
 )
 ```
